// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearch
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{

    private static bool EqualsAt(string str, int offset, string fragment) { int start = offset >= 0 ? offset : str.Length + offset; return string.CompareOrdinal(str, start, fragment, 0, fragment.Length) == 0; }

    private static readonly string[] _keys = new string[] {
        "Alpha", "Bravo", "Charlie"
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        if (!EqualsAt(key, 0, "Pre"))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (!EqualsAt(key, -3, "Suf"))
        {
         return false;
        }

        string lookupKey = key.Substring(3, key.Length - 6);


        int lo = 0;
        int hi = 2;
        while (lo <= hi)
        {
            int i = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            int order = StringComparer.Ordinal.Compare(_keys[i], lookupKey);

            if (order == 0)
                return true;
            if (order < 0)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i - 1;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 11;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 13;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = true;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
